name: Candied Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: Tabasco sauce or pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut whole tomatoes into pieces.
2. Combine the tomato pieces with bread cubes, sugar, vinegar, basil, and Tabasco or pepper in a 6-cup casserole dish.
3. Dot the mixture with butter.
4. Bake in a 400-degree oven until bubbling hot throughout and lightly browned, about 30 to 45 minutes.
- Alternatively, bring the combined ingredients to a boil in a saucepan on the stovetop.
- Lower the heat and simmer uncovered until slightly thickened, about 20 minutes.
Per serving: 80 calories, 2 grams protein, 15 grams carbohydrate, 2 grams fat, 3 milligrams cholesterol, 246 milligrams sodium.
